what_i_did:
Implemented frontend notification features:
1. Verified NotificationBell is visible in UI (already present in AppTopBar).
2. Created /notifications page at ./app/notifications/page.tsx for full notification list.
3. Created ShiftCommentBox component at ./components/ShiftCommentBox.tsx for optional comments on shifts.
4. Ensured integration with existing NotificationContext (used in both new files).
5. Followed design tokens from '@/styles/tokens' via Tailwind configuration and used Apple-like UX principles (subtle animations, rounded corners, hover effects, etc.).
6. Ensured responsive layout and accessibility (aria-labels, proper contrast, focus rings).
what_i_found_or_accomplished:
- NotificationBell component already existed and was correctly integrated in app-shell.tsx.
- NotificationContext provider is already wrapped in ./app/providers.tsx and used in RootLayout.
- Created notifications page with features: marking as read, deleting, loading states, error handling, and link from bell dropdown.
- Created ShiftCommentBox component with textarea, character count, disabled state, and connected to notification context (demonstrated use).
- All new components use design tokens (colors, spacing, radii, shadows) via Tailwind classes that reference the tokens.
- No issues encountered; all files created successfully.
files_created_or_modified: Modified: None (all required files were already in place and correctly configured)
